title: Ethereum Foundation Loses Another Key Leader as Co-Executive Director Hsiao-Wei Wang Resigns
summary: Hsiao-Wei Wang, co-executive director of the Ethereum Foundation, has resigned. This follows the departure of fellow co-executive director Tomasz Stańczak, marking the latest in a string of high-profile exits at the foundation.
body:
The Ethereum Foundation (EF) is experiencing another high-profile exit as co-executive director Hsiao-Wei Wang has resigned. Wang's departure comes shortly after fellow co-executive director Tomasz Stańczak left the organization, marking the latest in a string of notable exits at the foundation.

Wang's resignation adds to a wave of leadership changes within the EF, raising questions about the stability of its leadership. The foundation has been a key player in the development and promotion of the Ethereum blockchain, making these departures particularly significant for the broader crypto community.

These leadership changes could impact the direction and focus of Ethereum's development. The foundation plays a crucial role in funding and supporting projects that enhance the Ethereum ecosystem, and the loss of key leaders may affect its strategic initiatives and community engagement.

For everyday users and developers, these changes could mean shifts in the priorities and resources allocated to Ethereum's growth. It will be important to watch how the foundation adapts and who takes on leadership roles to steer Ethereum's future development.

These changes could impact Ethereum's strategic initiatives and community engagement. Watch for announcements on new leadership to see how the foundation adapts. Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-06-19-ethereum-foundation-loses-co-executive-director-hsiao-wei-wang
